@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "alertmanager-1903-expose-alert-fingerprint-in-notification-template",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "alertmanager: Expose alert fingerprint in notification template",
+    "description": "Expose alert fingerprint in notification template. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current alertmanager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nhelm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working alertmanager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review alertmanager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager\n```\nCurrently the following information is available to the notification template:\n\n```\n// Alert holds one alert for notification templates."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Expose alert fingerprint in notification template",
+        "description": "Hopefully fixes #1903 by adding the Fingerprint to the template data. My goal for this is to have the fingerprint in the Webhook data for downstream consumption.\n```yaml\n// Alert holds one alert for notification templates.\ntype Alert struct {\n\tStatus       string    `json:\"status\"`\n\tLabels       KV        `json:\"labels\"`\n\tAnnotations  KV        `json:\"annotations\"`\n\tStartsAt     time.Time `json:\"startsAt\"`\n\tEndsAt       time.Time `json:\"endsAt\"`\n\tGeneratorURL string    `json:\"generatorURL\"`\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Expose alert fingerprint in notification template\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hopefully fixes #1903 by adding the Fingerprint to the template data. My goal for this is to have the fingerprint in the Webhook data for downstream consumption.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "// Alert holds one alert for notification templates.\ntype Alert struct {\n\tStatus       string    `json:\"status\"`\n\tLabels       KV        `json:\"labels\"`\n\tAnnotations  KV        `json:\"annotations\"`\n\tStartsAt     time.Time `json:\"startsAt\"`\n\tEndsAt       time.Time `json:\"endsAt\"`\n\tGeneratorURL string    `json:\"generatorURL\"`\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
